Hero.label: Surgical Excellence
Hero.title:
Precision in Every Procedure.
Compassion in Every Care.
Hero.description: Advanced maxillofacial solutions delivered with technical mastery and a patient-centered approach. Transforming lives through aesthetic and functional restoration.

Intro.quote: "Your smile is the intersection of science and art."
Intro.title: A Commitment to Surgical Artistry
Intro.p1: Welcome to MaxilloSurg Surgical Arts. I am dedicated to providing the highest caliber of care in oral and maxillofacial surgery, combining rigorous clinical expertise with an eye for aesthetic balance.
Intro.p2: Our practice is built on the foundation of safety, innovation, and empathy. From complex reconstructive surgeries to routine oral procedures, our team utilizes the latest digital planning technologies to ensure predictable, life-enhancing outcomes for every patient who walks through our doors.

outpatient.title: Outpatient (Clinic) Surgery
outpatient.description: Specialized services including digital dental implants, impacted wisdom tooth extractions, gummy smile correction (crown lengthening), and advanced bone and gum grafting using laser technology.

hospital.title: Hospital & Reconstructive Surgery
hospital.description: Complex maxillofacial surgeries (orthognathic), submental liposuction, nano-fat injection for rejuvenation, and aesthetic eyelid surgery (blepharoplasty) performed in Tehran's top hospitals.

injections.label: Non-Surgical Rejuvenation
injections.title: Aesthetic Injections & Fillers
injections.description: Jawline and facial contouring, lip and cheek fillers, and wrinkle reduction with Botox (Dysport & Masport) performed by a maxillofacial surgeon.

sarah.text: "Dr. Vance changed my life. The corrective jaw surgery was a daunting prospect, but the precision and care shown by the entire team made me feel safe every step of the way."
sarah.author: SARAH M. • JAW RECONSTRUCTION

james.text: "The technology at MaxilloSurg is incredible. I had four wisdom teeth removed and the recovery was much faster and smoother than I ever expected. Truly professional."
james.author: JAMES L. • WISDOM TEETH

elena.text: "Professionalism at its finest. From the initial consultation to the final implant placement, the aesthetic result is perfect. I finally have my confidence back."
elena.author: ELENA R. • DENTAL IMPLANTS

Hero.label: ABOUT THE PRACTICE
Hero.title:
Precision in Surgery, 
Artistry in Restoration.
Hero.description: At MaxilloSurg Surgical Arts, we believe that maxillofacial surgery is a delicate balance of technical excellence and empathetic care. Led by world-renowned specialists, our practice is dedicated to restoring function and aesthetic harmony.

Mission.title: Our Foundation
Mission.subtitle: The core principles that guide every incision and interaction.

trust.title: Unwavering Trust
trust.description: We build lasting relationships through transparency, thorough education, and a commitment to patient safety that exceeds industry standards.

precision.title: Surgical Precision
precision.description: Leveraging 3D digital surgical planning and robotic assistance to ensure every procedure is executed with mathematical accuracy and minimal downtime.

comfort.title: Patient Comfort
comfort.description: From advanced anesthesia protocols to a soothing recovery environment, we prioritize your physical and emotional well-being throughout the journey.

Bio.name: Dr. Julian Vance, MD, DDS
Bio.p1: Dr. Julian Vance is a dual-degree surgeon specializing in complex reconstructive and aesthetic maxillofacial surgery. With over 20 years of clinical experience, he has pioneered techniques in minimally invasive orthognathic surgery and full-arch dental rehabilitation.
Bio.p2: His philosophy is rooted in "Anatomical Integrity"—the belief that the best surgical outcome is one that respects the natural structural harmony of the face while achieving life-changing functional improvements.
Bio.cert1: American Board of Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery
Bio.cert2: Fellow of the American College of Surgeons

step1.title: Founder, MaxilloSurg Surgical Arts
step1.description: Established a premier center for advanced surgical care, integrating AI-driven diagnosis and robotic surgical workflows.

step2.title: Chief of Maxillofacial Surgery, Metro General
step2.description: Directed a high-volume Level 1 trauma center, overseeing complex craniofacial reconstructions and training 15+ residents annually.

step3.title: Residency & Fellowship, Johns Hopkins
step3.description: Specialized fellowship in aesthetic facial surgery and microsurgical reconstruction.

Innovation.title: The Apex of Clinical Innovation
Innovation.description: Our clinic is more than a practice—it's a hub of surgical innovation. We utilize proprietary digital twin technology to map your unique anatomy before the first incision is ever made.

feature1.title: 3D Cone Beam CT Imaging
feature1.description: Ultra-low radiation scans for pinpoint diagnostic accuracy.

feature2.title: In-House Digital Lab
feature2.description: 3D printing of surgical guides and prosthetics for a perfect fit.

Team.title: The Specialists Behind Your Care
Team.subtitle: Our multi-disciplinary team ensures every aspect of your surgery—from anesthesia to recovery—is handled by dedicated professionals.

CTA.title: Begin Your Transformation
CTA.description: We are currently accepting new patient consultations for restorative and aesthetic procedures. Contact us to schedule an appointment with Dr. Vance.

Hero.label: Center of Excellence
Hero.title: Surgical Specialties
Hero.description: Advanced maxillofacial solutions combining surgical precision with aesthetic restoration. We specialize in complex reconstructive and corrective procedures for the face, jaws, and teeth.

outpatient.title: Outpatient Surgery
outpatient.description: Dental implants, impacted tooth surgery, crown lengthening, and bone/gum grafting with modern techniques.

hospital.title: Hospital Surgery
hospital.description: Specialized jaw surgery, liposuction, fat injection, and blepharoplasty in top medical centers.

injections.title: Aesthetic Injections
injections.description: Facial rejuvenation and contouring with filler, Neurogel, and Botox injections by a specialist.

Recovery.title: Your Path to Recovery
Recovery.description: We guide you through every stage of your surgical journey with transparency and specialized care protocols.

step2.title: Precision Procedure
step2.description: Minimally invasive techniques performed by board-certified surgeons.

step3.title: Post-Op Recovery
step3.description: Tailored monitoring and long-term aesthetic follow-ups.

outpatient.overview: Our outpatient surgical unit provides high-quality care for procedures that don't require an overnight stay. We focus on minimally invasive techniques to ensure rapid recovery and patient comfort.
outpatient.technology: Equipped with the latest digital imaging and laser surgical tools for precise and painless clinic-based procedures.

hospital.overview: For complex maxillofacial cases, we perform surgeries in Tehran's leading accredited hospitals. This ensures access to comprehensive medical support and advanced surgical theaters for major reconstructive work.
hospital.technology: Utilization of 3D virtual surgical planning and intraoperative navigation for complex hospital-based reconstructions.

injections.overview: Our aesthetic injection clinic offers non-surgical solutions for facial rejuvenation and contouring. All procedures are performed by a maxillofacial surgeon with a deep understanding of facial anatomy.
injections.technology: We use only premium, FDA-approved injectable brands and advanced micro-cannula techniques for natural-looking results with minimal bruising.

Hero.label: The Art of Restoration
Hero.title: Patient Archives & Case Gallery
Hero.description: Explore our curated collection of surgical outcomes. Each case represents a unique journey of structural precision and aesthetic harmony, documented through professional clinical photography and patient narratives.

case1.title: Corrective Orthognathic Journey
case1.description: A comprehensive approach to addressing functional malocclusion and enhancing facial symmetry through bi-maxillary advancement.
case1.quote: The precision of the planning gave me so much confidence. My breathing and my profile have completely changed for the better.
case1.author: Sarah J., 28

case2.title: Full-Arch Reconstruction
case2.description: Immediate-load dental implant solution for complete oral rehabilitation, restoring both bite force and natural smile aesthetics.
case2.quote: I can finally smile and eat without hesitation. The transition from the temporary to final teeth was seamless and artistic.
case2.author: Michael R., 54

case3.title: Post-Traumatic Symmetry
case3.description: Reconstructing complex orbital and zygomatic fractures using 3D-printed titanium guides for absolute anatomical accuracy.
case3.quote: The team at MaxilloSurg didn't just fix my bones; they gave me my identity back. The results are nothing short of miraculous.
case3.author: Elena V., 32

case4.label: Patient Story
case4.title: The Transformative Power of Precision
case4.description: Our archives contain hundreds of stories just like these. Every patient receives a customized surgical plan designed with virtual reality pre-planning and microscopic precision. We don't just treat conditions; we restore quality of life.

case5.title: Sleep Apnea Resolution
case5.description: Genioglossus advancement combined with chin reshaping to significantly improve airway patency and profile projection.
case5.quote: Finally, I can sleep through the night. The functional benefits were the priority, but the aesthetic result is a huge bonus.
case5.author: David K., 45

CTA.title: Begin Your Own Journey
CTA.description: Your transformation starts with a personalized consultation. Let our experts guide you through the possibilities of modern maxillofacial surgery.
